dashboard.title: My Sends
dashboard.warningKey: ⚠️ The encryption key is in the URL fragment (#). Keep this link secure!
dashboard.keyMissingDesc: The encryption key is not available for this send. You must have created the send on this browser to copy the link.

dropZone.dragDrop: Drag and drop your files here

form.sendNameHelp: Give a name to this send to identify it easily
form.maxDownloadsHelp: Number of times this file can be downloaded
form.expirationHelp: File will auto-delete after this period
form.passwordHelp: Recipients will need this password to download

errors.selectFile: Please select at least one file
errors.multiFileSizeLimit: Multi-file sends are limited to {{limit}} MB total. Please split your files into multiple sends.

uploading.title: Uploading your file...
uploading.message: Please wait while we securely upload your file

success.title: File uploaded successfully!
success.message: Share the link below to allow others to download your file
success.qrCodeDesc: Scan this QR code with your phone to access the download link

download.title: Secure File Download
download.qrCodeDesc: Scan this QR code to share this link on another device
download.passwordPlaceholder: Leave empty if not password protected

errors.keyMissing: Encryption key missing from URL. Cannot decrypt file.
errors.expired: This send has expired or reached its download limit
errors.decryptionFailed: Decryption failed. The encryption key may be invalid.
errors.limitReached: This file has reached its download limit and can no longer be downloaded.

download.footer: Files are decrypted locally in your browser • Zero-knowledge architecture

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage all sends and view statistics
admin.encryptedNameNotice: The name is end-to-end encrypted. Only the sender or recipient with the key can read it.

stats.totalSendsHelp: A 'send' corresponds to a unique upload (one or more zipped files, or text).

deleteDialog.title: Delete Send
deleteDialog.message: Are you sure you want to delete this send? This action cannot be undone.

cleanupDialog.title: Run Cleanup
cleanupDialog.message: This will permanently delete all expired, revoked, and exhausted sends. This action cannot be undone.

admin.cleanupSuccess: Cleanup completed: {{deletedSends}} sends deleted, {{deletedFiles}} files removed, {{freedSpace}} freed

settings.title: Instance Settings
settings.requireAuthForDownloadDesc: When enabled, users must be logged in to access download links.

profile.title: Profile
profile.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the application
